name: property managers processing 5–15 utility invoices/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual report preparation causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual preparation of utility expense reports is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual preparation of utility expense reports is time-consuming and error-prone.
